catalog.name: Boda cielo moderno
catalog.teaser: Una invitacion clara, elegante y luminosa para bodas modernas.
catalog.description: Template de boda con fondo azul claro, tarjeta limpia, detalles suaves y contenido editable para los datos principales del evento.
catalog.seo_title: Invitacion digital de boda cielo moderno
catalog.seo_description: Crea una invitacion digital de boda moderna con estilo claro, elegante y personalizable.

content.headline: Una historia que empieza para siempre
content.subheadline: Celebra con nosotros una noche llena de amor, musica y momentos inolvidables.
content.message: Nos encantaria compartir este dia tan especial contigo. Tu presencia hara que nuestra celebracion sea aun mas memorable.
content.closing: Gracias por acompanarnos en este nuevo comienzo.

catalog.name: Modern sky wedding
catalog.teaser: A bright, elegant invitation for modern weddings.
catalog.description: Wedding template with a light blue background, clean card layout, soft details and editable content for the main event information.
catalog.seo_description: Create a modern digital wedding invitation with a bright, elegant and customizable style.

content.headline: A story that begins forever
content.subheadline: Celebrate with us an evening full of love, music and unforgettable moments.
content.message: We would love to share this special day with you. Your presence will make our celebration even more memorable.
content.closing: Thank you for joining us in this new beginning.
